---
title: "Multiverse report"
format: html
params:
  results_rds: "results.rds"
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library(forkflow)
results <- readRDS(params$results_rds)
```

## Vibration of effects

```{r}
voe(results)
```

## Specification curve

```{r}
spec_curve(results)
```

## Vibration-of-effects volcano

```{r}
voe_volcano(results, colour = n_adjusters)
```
